title: 3D Card Effect
description: A CSS perspective card that rotates on all three axes as the mouse moves across it. Composed of three compound components: `CardContainer` wraps children in a `perspective: 1000px` context, `CardBody` preserves 3D transforms, and `CardItem` individually translates or rotates each layer (text, image, button) in Z-space to create a parallax depth effect on hover.
